title: CTA SPRS Output Package
description: Schema for the SPRS submission package generated by CTA Studio. Maps CTA artifact data to PIEE SPRS portal submission fields. One package per SPRS affirmation event.

package_id.description: Unique identifier for this SPRS output package.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this package was generated.

artifact_ref.description: Reference back to the source CTA artifact.

artifact_id.description: artifact_id from the source CTA artifact.

signature.description: SHA-256 signature value from the source CTA artifact. Allows CTA Verify API to retrieve and validate the full artifact.

generated_at.description: generated_at from the source CTA artifact.

issuer.description: Contractor identity fields required by PIEE SPRS portal.

sam_expiration_date.description: SAM.gov registration expiration date. CTA Studio will warn if expiration is within 60 days.

sprs_submission.description: SPRS score and supporting data for PIEE portal entry.

score.description: SPRS score to submit. Must equal sprs_score.calculated in the source CTA artifact.

assessment_date.description: Date the assessment was completed. Maps to 'Date of Assessment' in PIEE SPRS.

assessment_type.description: Assessment type. Maps to 'Assessment Type' in PIEE SPRS.

system_name.description: Name of the organizational system assessed. Maps to 'System Name' in PIEE SPRS.

system_description.description: Brief description of the system scope. Maps to 'System Description' in PIEE SPRS.

plan_of_action_exists.description: Whether a POA&M exists for unimplemented controls. Maps to 'Plan of Action' checkbox in PIEE SPRS.

poam_completion_date.description: Target date for all POA&M items to be resolved, if applicable.

nist_revision.description: NIST publication version assessed against. CTA v0.1 targets Rev 2.

total_controls_assessed.description: Total number of CMMC Level 2 practices assessed.

affirmation.description: Executive affirmation record — the signed declaration required by DFARS 252.204-7019.

statement.const: I affirm that the organization named herein has implemented and will maintain implementation of all applicable CMMC security requirements to the extent reflected in the SPRS score submitted herewith, and that the information provided is accurate and complete to the best of my knowledge.
statement.description: Canonical DFARS affirmation statement. Must not be modified.

affirmed_by_name.description: Full legal name of the authorizing official.

affirmed_by_title.description: Title of the authorizing official (e.g., CEO, President, Compliance Officer).

affirmed_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the affirmation was signed.

liability_acknowledged.description: Must be true. Acknowledges that false affirmations may constitute a violation of the False Claims Act (31 U.S.C. §§ 3729-3733), subject to civil and criminal penalties.

prime_delivery.description: Optional: metadata for artifact delivery to a prime contractor via CTA Verify API.

prime_cage_code.description: CAGE code of the prime contractor to receive this artifact.

contract_number.description: Contract number this artifact is associated with.

delivered_at.description: Timestamp when the artifact was delivered to the prime via CTA Verify API.

verify_api_receipt.description: Receipt token from CTA Verify API confirming delivery.
